action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh. Need to train RL policy on 10 Minigrid envs. Analysis: PPO with stable-baselines3 is a solid baseline. With 10 different environments and various difficulties, training separate policies per env is likely better than one multi-task policy given the diversity (different observation distributions, goals). However, time budget is 10h. Best strategy: train one PPO per environment in parallel using vectorized envs; use ImgObsWrapper or FlatObsWrapper. Let me start with a quick baseline first - train a multi-task PPO with mission encoding via a CNN on image, ignoring text mission for now (most envs have a single mission type so direction+image suffices). Decision: First build a simple per-environment PPO training pipeline. Start with a short run on a few environments to validate pipeline + measure timing.
action.command: python -c "import gymnasium as gym, minigrid; from minigrid.wrappers import ImgObsWrapper; e=ImgObsWrapper(gym.make('MiniGrid-DoorKey-8x8-v0')); o,_=e.reset(seed=0); print(o.shape, o.dtype, e.action_space, e.observation_space)"
